blocks.text: Champions League Night: Barcelona, Liverpool, and Augusta Awaits

Wednesday delivers a feast: two blockbuster Champions League quarter-final first legs, chess drama in Cyprus, and the Masters looming at dawn Thursday. Norwegian eyes on Wærenskjold in Belgium and Hovland teeing off at Augusta.
♟️ Round 9 – FIDE Candidates 2026 — Every half-point decisive as the World Championship challenger spot nears. 14:30
🚴 Scheldeprijs 2026 — Flat Belgian sprinters' classic; Wærenskjold is Norway's sole podium hope. 11:00
